positive.prompt: Write a short dated change plan for this patch without code or an independent review
Create a quick repair plan with scope, risks, and acceptance criteria
Save a brief plan for the login bug fix without code or an independent review

negative.prompt: Turn this PRD into a durable task breakdown with dependencies and an independent plan review
Run an independent code review and repair loop against this approved specification and implementation plan

evals.prompt: Create a brief plan for a known login retry bug. Save a dated Markdown file, do not write code, do not request an independent review, and keep the plan to approach, scope, risks, and acceptance criteria.
evals.expected_output: One dated Markdown change-plan artifact with only a title and the four required Chinese sections, grounded acceptance proof, no implementation code, and no review workflow.
expectations: The agent writes one dated Markdown plan under docs/plans/ when the user supplies no destination
The filename begins with the execution environment's local YYYY-MM-DD date and does not overwrite an existing plan
The artifact contains only a title and the headings 方案, 范围, 风险, and 验收标准
范围 explicitly distinguishes included and excluded work
风险 gives a mitigation, evidence-to-obtain, or formal-planning escalation condition
Every acceptance criterion includes observable proof such as a targeted test, command, or inspection
The artifact contains no implementation code, pseudocode, diff, CANDIDATE or FINAL status, reviewer, or subagent record
